title: Purple Fireworks!
description: A vanilla revamp to fireworks to make them purple!
body: This is another vanilla firework reskin to make it purple! The support on all my resource packs so far has been really amazing! I really appreciate the support! Just like my other firework resource pack, it does work with the crossbow when shooting fireworks! Thank you all again for all the support! I will continue uploading things as I have time to make them for you all!
